subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this lowly one who summoneth all them that dwell in the heavens and on earth unto His Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المفتقر الذی یدعو کل من فی السموات و الارض الی ربه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @chastisement and requital, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @imagery in the Qur'an, @Word of God the cause of creation, @transcendence; unknowability of God
